issue_summary: Huge new source dump for source release 3, which will also become our first binary release shortly.
javadoc_before:
/** * Converts the given ThreadPoolExecutor into an ExecutorService that exits * when the application is complete. It does so by using daemon threads and * adding a shutdown hook to wait for their completion. * *

This is mainly for fixed thread pools. * See {@link java.util.concurrent.Executors#newFixedThreadPool(int)}. * * @param executor the executor to modify to make sure it exits when the * application is finished * @param terminationTimeout how long to wait for the executor to * finish before terminating the JVM * @param timeUnit unit of time for the time parameter * @return an unmodifiable version of the input which will not hang the JVM */
javadoc_after:
/**
   * Old location of {@link MoreExecutors#getExitingExecutorService(
   * ThreadPoolExecutor, long, TimeUnit)}.
   */
